_comment: Bonsai-MCP connection config (guide §9). The add-on runs a socket server inside Blender; the MCP server bridges Claude Code to it. Adjust host/port to match the Blender add-on panel.

safety._note: execute_blender_code runs arbitrary Python — gate it, save first, chunk large ops.

publish_on_save._note: On IFC save, re-run Phase 1 conversion (services/converter) to refresh .frag tiles. Pins/RFIs survive because they reference GUIDs.
